title: "Copy Link" to copy to clipboard as a formatted hyperlink with name of item as text
excerpt:
When clicking “Copy Link” it would be nice if it came formatted as an actual HTML hyper link so that the title comes with it and people can actually know what is being talked about at a glance vs having to click a link. 
…

posts.author: alicia.482 (A E)
posts.cookedHtml:
When clicking “Copy Link” it would be nice if it came formatted as an actual HTML hyper link so that the title comes with it and people can actually know what is being talked about at a glance vs having to click a link.

Example:

  1. Click “Copy Link”
  2. Receive in clipboard: {Item Name}
